entity.name: France / Macron Government
entity.description: Macron's government is the EU's loudest pro-frontier-lab voice — softened EU AI Act foundation-model provisions in 2023 trilogue to protect Mistral. Hosted the Feb 2025 AI Action Summit pivoting from Bletchley's safety frame to a "AI for growth" frame. Key swing actor in EU AI politics.

activity.title: Official visit to India of President Macron — France-India joint announcements on AI
activity.raw_text: The President of the French Republic and Mrs Brigitte Macron made an official visit to India from 17 to 19 February 2026. This visit, the fourth by President Macron since 2017, comes a year after the Artificial Intelligence Action Summit hosted in Paris and is part of the continuous dialogue between France and India on major technological, economic, and strategic issues. On February 17, 2026, the President of the French Republic and Prime Minister Modi adopted a Joint Statement.
